test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rdf_triples ( subject String, predicate LowCardinality(String), object String, INDEX idx_subject subject TYPE bloom_filter GRANULARITY 4, INDEX idx_object object TYPE bloom_filter GRANULARITY 4 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (predicate, subject, object)
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_types ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (object, subject) AS SELECT subject, object FROM rdf_triples WHERE predicate = 'rdf:type'
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':person', toString(number)) AS subject, 'rdf:type' AS predicate, ':Person' AS object FROM numbers(100000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':person', toString(number)) AS subject, ':name' AS predicate, concat('Person_', toString(number)) AS object FROM numbers(100000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':person', toString(number)) AS subject, ':age' AS predicate, toString(18 + number % 60) AS object FROM numbers(100000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':person', toString(number)) AS subject, ':email' AS predicate, concat('person', toString(number), '@example.com') AS object FROM numbers(50000)
INSERT INTO rdf_triples SELECT concat(':person', toString(number)) AS subject, ':department' AS predicate, concat(':dept', toString(number % 100)) AS object FROM numbers(30000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name WHERE { ?p <rdf:type> <:Person> . ?p <:name> ?name }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age WHERE { ?p <rdf:type> <:Person> . ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?email WHERE { ?p <rdf:type> <:Person> . ?p <:name> ?name . OPTIONAL { ?p <:email> ?email } }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?name ?age WHERE { ?p <:name> ?name . ?p <:age> ?age . FILTER (?age > 50) }') FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM sparql('SELECT ?info WHERE { { ?p <:email> ?info } UNION { ?p <:department> ?info } }') FORMAT Null
SELECT t2.object AS name FROM rdf_triples AS t1 JOIN rdf_triples AS t2 ON t2.subject = t1.subject WHERE t1.predicate = 'rdf:type' AND t1.object = ':Person' AND t2.predicate = ':name' FORMAT Null
